meta.title: Iliya Glazunov | Mobile, Full-Stack & Data Developer
meta.description: Software developer specialising in Mobile (Swift, React Native), Back-End (Python/Django) and Data & AI. Built production web platforms, commercial mobile apps and ML models. Based in Paris.
meta.keywords: portfolio, mobile developer, Swift, React Native, Python, Django, data analyst, AI, LLM, developer, Paris

home.title: Hello, I'm Iliya Glazunov
home.description:
I design and build production-grade software across the full stack — from native iOS apps in Swift and cross-platform mobile experiences with React Native & Expo, to robust back-end systems powered by Python, Django and PostgreSQL.

Since 2022 I have shipped real-world products: a live Django/PostgreSQL web platform (eurasieanalyse.fr), two commercial mobile applications and a suite of automation tools. I hold professional certifications in Generative AI Engineering, Full-Stack Development and Data Analytics from IBM and Google, and actively integrate LLM APIs (Gemini, GPT) into my projects.
home.subtitle: Mobile (Swift · React Native) · Back-End (Python · Django) · Data & AI — building production software since 2022.

about.headline: Beyond the Code.
about.p1: I am a versatile software engineer with a Master's degree in Computer Science from Université Paris-Saclay and hands-on experience spanning mobile development, web back-end engineering, and applied machine learning.
about.p2: From shipping a live Django/PostgreSQL platform to building native iOS apps in Swift and integrating LLM APIs into cross-platform React Native applications, I thrive on solving multi-disciplinary challenges end-to-end — from architecture to deployment.

contact.title: Let's build the future.
contact.intro: Currently accepting selected consulting roles and software engineering opportunities.
